headline: Why Investors Need to Take Advantage of These 2 Basic Materials Stocks Now
summary: The Zacks Earnings ESP is a great way to find potential earnings surprises. Why investors should take advantage now.

headline: LyondellBasell: North America's Cost Advantage Is Just Getting Started
summary: LyondellBasell (LYB) stays a Buy: North American cost edge, higher margins from feedstock divergence, refinery exit to recycling, $1.5B EBITDA by 2028.
